description: UI improvements for Manager/Operator Actions pages: Fixed button styling (oval to rectangle), added Onboard button for approved users, and added Archive button for rejected users

tasks.title: Fix Action Button Styling
tasks.description: Change action button border-radius from 50% (oval/circular) to 5px (rounded rectangle)
tasks.notes: Updated CSS in both manager-actions-display.php and operator-actions-display.php

tasks.title: Add Onboard Button
tasks.description: Add Onboard button after Undo Approve button in Approved tab and for approved records in All tab
tasks.notes: UI implementation complete. Backend handler (JavaScript/AJAX) still needs to be implemented for actual onboarding functionality

tasks.title: Add Archive Button
tasks.description: Add Archive button after Undo Rejection button in Rejected tab and for rejected records in All tab
tasks.notes: UI implementation complete with down arrow icon (↓) matching Assign button style. Gray background (#9E9E9E). Backend handler (JavaScript/AJAX) still needs to be implemented for actual archive functionality

verification.notes: Files modified, ready for local testing
